hero.title: 9 Days, Best of the South.
hero.titleAccent: Karnataka, the Nilgiris and Kerala in One Grand Tour.
hero.intro: The definitive South India tour. Bangalore and Mysore's palaces, the Nilgiri hills and toy train, and across into Kerala's tea country and backwaters. Nine days through the very best the south has to offer.
hero.heroImageAlt: Best of South India palaces hills and Kerala backwaters

overview.heading: 9 Days Best of South India: The Full Picture
body: This 9 day grand tour brings together the highlights of South India across two states. From the gardens of Bangalore and the palace of Mysore, up into the Nilgiri hills of Ooty, and across into Kerala for the tea country of Munnar and an overnight houseboat on the backwaters.

Arranged privately from Malaysia, it is the most complete South India journey we offer, blending cities, palaces, hill stations, the famous toy train and the Kerala backwaters. Your own vehicle and driver guide link it all at a relaxed pace, with the scenery changing dramatically from day to day.

highlights.heading: Why Travellers from Malaysia Love This Trip

items.title: Mysore & the Nilgiri Hills
items.body: The grand Mysore Palace and the cool blue hills of Ooty, with a ride on the UNESCO-listed Nilgiri toy train through forests and tea gardens.

items.title: Munnar's Tea Country
items.body: Crossing into Kerala, the rolling tea estates of Munnar bring cool mountain air and some of the most beautiful hill scenery in the south.

items.title: Kerala Backwater Houseboat
items.body: The journey finishes with an overnight houseboat on the Kerala backwaters, with onboard meals and a peaceful night on the water.

days.title: Arrive Bangalore
days.description: Met at Bangalore airport and transferred to your hotel.

days.title: Bangalore to Mysore
days.description: Bangalore highlights, then drive to Mysore.

days.title: Mysore to Ooty
days.description: Mysore sights, then up to the Nilgiri hills.

days.title: Ooty & Toy Train
days.description: Ooty sightseeing and the toy train.

days.title: Ooty to Munnar
days.description: Cross into Kerala and the tea hills of Munnar.

days.title: Munnar Sightseeing
days.description: A full day in the tea country.

days.title: Munnar to Alleppey Houseboat
days.description: Descend to the backwaters and board your private houseboat.

days.title: Backwaters to Kochi
days.description: Morning cruise, then to Fort Kochi.

days.title: Depart Kochi
days.description: Checkout and transfer to Cochin airport for your onward flight.

hotelOptions.heading: Choose Your Comfort Level
hotelOptions.subheading: Centrally located hotels with easy access to the main sights. Pick the tier that suits your style.

whyBook.heading: The Whole South, One Grand Loop
whyBook.body: Linking Karnataka, the Nilgiris and Kerala takes careful routing to avoid backtracking. We sequence the cities, hills and backwaters so the journey flows beautifully. Dhesu has run South India tours since 1988.

points.title: MATTA & IATA Registered
points.body: Fully licensed Malaysian travel agency. We guide you through India e-Visa documentation with every booking.

points.title: Private Tours, Daily Departures
points.body: No minimum group to wait for. Your trip runs on your dates, your pace, your own vehicle and guide.

points.title: A Real Team to Call
points.body: Reachable throughout your trip. Flight delayed, your guide waits. Plans change, we adapt on the ground.

points.title: Group & Custom Pricing
points.body: Travelling as a family or group lowers the per-person cost. Ask us for a tailored quote.

sections.heading: Best of South India Tour from Malaysia
sections.body:
This 9 day grand tour is the most complete South India journey we offer, spanning Karnataka, the Nilgiris and Kerala. It captures cities, palaces, hill stations, the famous toy train and the Kerala backwaters in one smooth loop.

A private vehicle and driver guide make the long, varied journey relaxed and flexible, with dramatically changing scenery from day to day.

It is ideal for travellers who want to experience the full diversity of the south in a single trip.

sections.heading: From Karnataka to Kerala
sections.body:
The beauty of this tour is its variety. You begin in Karnataka with Bangalore's gardens and Mysore's palace, climb into the Nilgiri hills of Ooty, then cross into Kerala for Munnar's tea estates and the backwaters.

The transitions, from city to palace to hill station to backwater, give a real sense of the south's range, all linked by a comfortable private vehicle.

items.question: Do Malaysians need a visa for India?
items.answer: Yes. Malaysian passport holders apply for an India e-Visa online before departure. The tourist e-Visa covers tourism and short visits and is valid for 30 days from entry. The application is on the official India e-Visa portal, and Dhesu walks you through it when you book. Visa fees are not included in the package price.

items.question: Which airport does this trip use?
items.answer: This is a land-only package: hotels, transfers, tours and guide are included, but international flights are not. Most Malaysian travellers fly from Kuala Lumpur International Airport (KLIA) to Bangalore and Cochin Airports (BLR / COK). We can recommend suitable flights and timings on request.

items.question: What is the best time for this 9 day tour?
items.answer: October to March offers pleasant weather across all the regions. The hill stations of Ooty and Munnar are cool year-round. The monsoon brings lush scenery but can affect hill roads and the toy train schedule.

items.question: Does the trip start and end in different cities?
items.answer: It typically begins in Bangalore and ends in Kochi, both of which have airports. We arrange flights and transfers to suit. This avoids backtracking and makes the loop efficient. Let us know your preferred routing when booking.

items.question: Are the toy train and houseboat both included?
items.answer: Yes. The package includes a ride on the Nilgiri toy train and an overnight private houseboat on the Kerala backwaters, two of the most memorable experiences in South India.
